'''Franklin Wendell Welker''' (born [[March 12]], [[1940s#1946|1946]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Americans|American]] voice actor. He is responsible for a broad spectrum of character voices, noises, and other vocal effects that have appeared over the last 40 years in American TV shows and movies. Welker is particularly noted for a wide range of non-verbal vocal effects, i.e., for aliens and (non-talking) animals.

Frank Welker portrayed the characters [[Jorak Uln]], [[Sunry]], and [[Handon Guld]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.

In 1980, he voiced Mr. Cool in the animated series [[Wikipedia:The Fonz and the Happy Days Gang|''The Fonz and the Happy Days Gang'']], alongside [[Ron Howard]].

As of [[July]] [[2011]], Frank Welker has voiced or appeared in ninety-six motion pictures with a combined gross revenue of over 6.2 billion dollars. No other actor's filmography has collectively earned more; Welker sits at the number one position in [http://www.the-numbers.com The Numbers.com's] "All Time Top 100 Stars at the Box Office" list. Other ''[[Star Wars]]'' actors on the list are [[Samuel L. Jackson]] (#2), [[John Ratzenberger]] (#4), [[Harrison Ford]] (#6), [[Warwick Davis]] (#7), [[James Earl Jones]] (#14), [[Frank Oz]] (#33), [[Liam Neeson]] (#40), [[Kenny Baker]] (#52), [[Christopher Lee]] (#55), [[Anthony Daniels]] (#74), [[Jon Favreau]] (#82), and [[Natalie Portman]] (#94).<ref name="By the numbers">{{WebCite|url=https://www.the-numbers.com/box-office-star-records|text=
All Time Top 100 Stars at the Box Office|accessdate=2011-07-29|work=The Numbers|archivedate=20200819155016}}</ref>
